description: One-time lethal damage protection that triggers once per round when a fatal hit would occur. Prevents death by zeroing armor damage when both health damage and armor damage would be positive.

OnBeforeDamageReceived.signature: void OnBeforeDamageReceived(DivineInterventionHandler this, Entity attacker, Skill attackSkill, DamageInfo damageInfo)
OnBeforeDamageReceived.description: Intercepts incoming damage before application. If damage would be lethal and handler hasn't triggered this round, zeros armor damage to prevent kill.

OnRoundStart.description: Resets the HasTriggeredThisRound flag to allow protection to trigger again.

Create.description: Factory method that instantiates a new handler and stores effect data reference.

handler_fields.name: Skill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the parent Skill object that owns this handler. Used for GetActor() and displaying skill feedback.

handler_fields.name: EffectData
handler_fields.description: Reference to the effect data ScriptableObject containing configuration. Set during Create().

handler_fields.name: HasTriggeredThisRound
handler_fields.description: Flag indicating whether divine intervention has already been used this round. Reset to false on OnRoundStart, set to true when protection triggers.

effect_data_fields.name: N/A
effect_data_fields.description: DivineIntervention effect does not appear to have custom fields at 0x58. The base effect inherits from BaseEffect which inherits from TileBase (Unity ScriptableObject).

LimitMaxHpLossHandler.description: Caps incoming damage to a percentage of the actor's max HP.

OnBeforeDamageReceived.description: Calculates max damage cap as Actor.MaxHP * MaxDamagePercent and reduces damage if exceeded.

Create.description: Factory method to create handler instance.

effect_data_fields.name: MaxDamagePercent
effect_data_fields.description: Maximum damage as percentage of max HP (e.g., 0.25 = 25% max HP cap per hit). Default 1.0f (100%, no effective limit).

IgnoreDamageEffectHandler.description: Chance-based damage reduction that requires matching tags.

OnBeforeDamageReceived.description: Checks tag requirements, rolls chance, applies percentage reduction to both HP and armor damage.

effect_data_fields.name: ChancePercent
effect_data_fields.description: Percentage chance for the damage reduction to trigger (0-100).

effect_data_fields.name: ReductionPercent
effect_data_fields.description: Percentage of damage to reduce when triggered (0-100).

effect_data_fields.name: RequiredTags
effect_data_fields.description: List of tags that must be present on the attacking skill for this effect to apply.

entity_fields.description: Menace.Tactical.Entity health-related fields referenced by damage handlers

fields.name: MaxHP
fields.description: Maximum hitpoints of the entity. Used by LimitMaxHpLoss to calculate damage cap.

damage_info_fields.description: DamageInfo struct passed to OnBeforeDamageReceived handlers

fields.name: Damage
fields.description: Final calculated damage amount. Modified by damage reduction effects.

fields.name: ArmorDmgFlat
fields.description: Flat armor durability damage. DivineIntervention zeros this to prevent kill.

fields.name: ArmorDmgPct
fields.description: Percentage-based armor damage. Modified by IgnoreDamageEffect.

key_discoveries: DivineInterventionHandler provides once-per-round lethal damage protection by zeroing ArmorDmgFlat (offset 0x34 in DamageInfo)
The protection resets at the start of each round via OnRoundStart callback
Protection triggers only when both Damage (0x2c) > 0 AND ArmorDmgFlat (0x34) > 0 in DamageInfo
LimitMaxHpLossHandler uses Entity.MaxHP at offset 0x58 to calculate the damage cap
LimitMaxHpLoss effect data stores MaxDamagePercent as a float at offset 0x58 (default 1.0f)
IgnoreDamageEffect has a more complex system with chance rolls, tag requirements, and percentage reduction
All damage handlers use the Skill reference at handler offset 0x10 for GetActor() and visual feedback
Effect data is stored at handler offset 0x18 as set during the Create() factory method

ghidra_comments_added.comment: Documented handler fields and trigger conditions
Documented factory pattern and effect data storage
Documented damage cap calculation using MaxHP and MaxDamagePercent
Documented Entity health fields at offsets 0x54-0x60
